task_name: Server LLM Layer + realtime.ts Agent Events

concerns_addressed: Prior Critical (Anthropic.ClientOptions TS2694 at llm.ts:29) — FIXED: correction 22e8dbe imports `{ ClientOptions }` as a named export and types `opts: ClientOptions` (llm.ts:15,29). `npm run build --workspace=server` exits 0.

Prior Minor (unguarded response.content[0] access) — FIXED: optional chaining `response.content[0]?.type` applied in classifyIntent (llm.ts:76), generateExplanation (llm.ts:114), and generateClarificationQuestion (llm.ts:143).

Prior Minor (reasoning param unused / NATIVE-gated thinking not implemented) — ADDRESSED as documented deferral: correction added an explanatory comment (llm.ts:161-163) stating extended-thinking/cache_control gating is deferred. QUALITY BAR did not list thinking/cache_control as must-haves, and Phase 1's first executing card (Research Specialist) is reasoning=false, so the gap is never exercised in scope.

strengths: All 5 system prompts (Research Specialist, Analysis Specialist, Writer, Editor, QA Guardian) reproduced verbatim from spec Template Definition, including en-dash characters and XML structure (templates.ts:27-256).
QA Guardian is the last column with position 5; analysis-specialist and qa-guardian carry reasoning=true exactly per spec (templates.ts).
All 7 agent.* event types present in realtime.ts BoardEvent union (realtime.ts:41-48).
executeCard substitutes {original_intent} via renderSystemPrompt before the LLM call (llm.ts:170); renderSystemPrompt leaves Phase 2 tokens intact (templates.ts:282-289).
@anthropic-ai/sdk is in server/package.json (^0.104.1) and confirmed NOT imported anywhere under client/src.
No hardcoded API key; key sourced from process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; dual `api-key` header wired for MiMo when non-NATIVE (llm.ts:38-42). core/* untouched.
Build compiles (exit 0) and all 11 tests pass (templates.test.ts 7, llm.test.ts 4).

issues.description: executeCard does not implement the plan's NATIVE-gated `cache_control: ephemeral` on the system block nor the `thinking` param for reasoning=true on real Anthropic. The NATIVE flag is only used to toggle the api-key header. Acceptable for Phase 1 (MiMo is the active target; first executing card is reasoning=false), but the gating described in plan Step 5 is not present.

Default model fallback is "claude-sonnet-4-20250514" whereas the plan referenced "claude-sonnet-4-6". Practically inert since ANTHROPIC_MODEL is set for the active MiMo deployment, but it diverges from the plan's noted default.
